entries.decision: Created WrongQuestionVO for JOIN query returning combined question + wrong-question data
entries.rationale: Avoids N+1 query problem when returning wrong questions with their associated question data
entries.impact: Single query per endpoint, efficient data loading

entries.decision: Used localProgressMap ref in WrongExamView for per-question consecutive correct tracking
entries.rationale: Server-side consecutiveCorrect value is stale after first correct answer in same session; local map tracks incrementally
entries.impact: Accurate progress display during wrong exam session

entries.rationale: Should not block UI for wrong answer recording during normal exams
entries.impact: Non-blocking UX, wrong answers still recorded
